channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Karpathy shares 'LLM Knowledge Base' architecture that bypasses RAG with an evolving markdown library maintained by AI
item.description: AI vibe coders have yet another reason to thank Andrej Karpathy, the coiner of the term. The former Director of AI at Tesla and co-founder of OpenAI, now running his own independent AI project, recently posted on X describing a "LLM Knowledge Bases" approach he's using to manage various topics of research interest. By building a persistent, LLM-maintained record of his projects, Karpathy is solving the core frustration of "stateless" AI development: the dreaded context-limit reset.As anyone who has vibe coded can attest, hitting a usage limit or ending a session often feels like a lobotomy for...

item.title: Nvidia launches enterprise AI agent platform with Adobe, Salesforce, SAP among 17 adopters at GTC 2026
item.description: Jensen Huang walked onto the GTC stage Monday wearing his trademark leather jacket and carrying, as it turned out, the blueprints for a new kind of industry dominance.The Nvidia CEO unveiled the Agent Toolkit, an open-source platform for building autonomous AI agents, and then rattled off the names of the companies that will use it: Adobe, Salesforce, SAP, ServiceNow, Siemens, CrowdStrike, Atlassian, Cadence, Synopsys, IQVIA, Palantir, Box, Cohesity, Dassault Systèmes, Red Hat, Cisco and Amdocs. Seventeen enterprise software companies, touching virtually every industry and every Fortune 500 co...

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Saturday, April 4 (game #1531)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, April 4 (game #1028)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, April 4 (game #762)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: The anonymous social app that thinks it can work in Saudi Arabia
item.description: When Fizz quietly debuted in Saudi Arabia, founder and CEO Teddy Solomon wasn’t expecting the app to catch on like it did.

item.title: Forget the tower: Dell’s palm-sized desktop draws 100W through USB-C and still manages 50 TOPS of AI computing power
item.description: Dell’s Pro 5 Micro Desktop delivers AI acceleration, high-speed DDR5 memory, and USB-C powered compact design for tight office spaces.

item.title: Two Songs We Really Wish Were the Anime Outros for ‘Steel Ball Run’
item.description: If Netflix, Warner Bros. Japan, and David Production really want to appease disgruntled 'JoJo's Bizarre Adventure' fans, they should make either of these two bops the ending themes for 'Steel Ball Run.'

item.title: A smarter way to use AI is now just $79 for life
item.description: Simplify working with AI thanks to this lifetime subscription to ChatPlayground AI Unlimited Plan.

item.title: AI Training Data Giant Mercor Is Reportedly Looking to Buy the Work You Did at Your Old Job
